title: Fix virtual interface select from sub-interface instance (#7203)

features.name: virtual interface sub-interface member access
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface handle accessing a sub-interface instance's member through chained dot notation

features.name: virtual interface typedef with concrete interface type
features.description: Code should include a typedef creating a virtual interface type from a concrete interface

features.name: interface with sub-interface instance
features.description: Code should include an interface that instantiates another interface as a member
